overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a character in robotic armor walking along a high-rise rooftop at night. The character approaches the edge of the building, revealing a sprawling neon-lit cityscape below with massive scrolling holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop walkway with holographic advertising

agents.ego_description: character in robotic exoskeleton walking steadily along the rooftop platform toward the edge

entered.detail: massive vertical holographic screen displaying scrolling advertisements with 'All Eyes' text visible
futuristic curved architecture with horizontal slats and metallic railings
dark metal walkway with red accent lighting and yellow safety markings
safety hazard markings on platform edges and equipment

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a high-rise rooftop platform at night, flanked by a massive holographic advertising tower on the left and curved metal architecture on the right. Red neon lights accent the dark metal walkway as the character moves steadily forward through the cyberpunk environment.

events.description: exits the covered platform area into open air with full sky visibility and distant mountains appearing

agents.ego_description: character approaching the edge of the building with the city skyline becoming visible in the distance

entered.detail: dark mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the city
distant city lights and building tops visible beyond the platform edge

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into an open rooftop area with unobstructed views of the sky and distant mountains. The holographic advertising tower now dominates the center of the frame, displaying 'Feel a Circus' and 'MaxiWear' advertisements as the character approaches the platform's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop precipice with vertical city view

events.description: camera tilts downward to look over the edge, revealing the depth of the city below

agents.ego_description: character stops at the edge of the building and looks down at the sprawling cityscape below

entered.detail: upper floors of skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible below the platform level
transparent safety barrier at the edge of the rooftop platform

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the edge of the rooftop and stops, with the camera tilting down to reveal the vertiginous drop into the city below. The holographic tower now displays 'Zetatech Body Without Limits' as it shifts to the right side of the frame, while the dense urban landscape becomes visible beneath.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of cyberpunk city canyon

events.description: full depth of the city canyon revealed with dense neon signage and towering skyscrapers filling the view

agents.ego_description: character standing at the edge observing the sprawling neon-lit metropolis below

entered.detail: illuminated corporate signage on building facade
skyscraper with prominent company branding and neon lighting
large pink and white advertisement for circus entertainment
round architectural feature visible at the bottom of the city canyon

segments.scene_description: The camera looks straight down into the heart of the cyberpunk city, revealing a dizzying array of neon-lit skyscrapers, corporate signage including DVA and Zetatech, and dense urban architecture. The holographic tower remains visible on the right while the full vertical scale of the metropolis is displayed below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a high-rise rooftop that transitions from a confined industrial walkway into a dizzying aerial vista of a neon-lit metropolis. It begins with the character walking through a dark metal corridor flanked by curved architecture and red neon accents, moving steadily beside a massive holographic advertising tower. As the character emerges from the covered path, the environment opens into an expansive rooftop area where the holographic tower dominates the center, displaying advertisements for MaxiWear and Feel a Circus against a backdrop of distant mountains. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the platform's edge and stops, with the camera tilting downward to reveal a vertiginous drop while the holographic tower slides to the right to showcase Zetatech branding. Finally, the camera looks straight down into the heart of the city, exposing the full vertical scale of the cyberpunk landscape filled with dense skyscrapers and corporate signage.
